description.overview: Related to the Newfoundland, the Landseer is a gentle giant with a distinctive black and white coat. They're patient, noble dogs who love children.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, patient, calm.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, flat, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Related to the Newfoundland, the Landseer is a gentle giant with a distinctive black and white coat. They're patient, noble dogs who love children.
